title: IP Protection in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger ip protection in practice judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: IP Protection in Practice is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: IP Protection in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good ip protection in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
IP Protection in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
